---
title: "Asset Downloads"
slug: resources/brand-assets/asset-downloads
---

This page provides unified guidelines for the usage specifications and download methods of 6MM Embedded Exchange visual assets, applicable to partners integrating 6MM perpetual contract trading capabilities via SDK / API.

This document combines asset specifications (sizes / formats / usage rules) and asset downloads (categories / previews / ZIP packages), allowing partners to complete the following within a single page:

* Review specifications
* Compare examples
* Download corresponding asset packages

All specifications are designed with embedded integration, cross-platform compatibility, and long-term maintenance as core objectives.

***

<Frame>
  <img src="data:image/png;base64," alt="" />
</Frame>

<h2 id="1-logo-assets">1. Logo Assets</h2>

Recommended Sizes (px)

| Size        | Usage Description        |
| ----------- | ------------------------ |
| 128 × 128   | Small logo usage         |
| 256 × 256   | Standard display         |
| 512 × 512   | High-resolution display  |
| 1024 × 1024 | Master brand source file |

Formats

* PNG
* SVG

Download

<Download src="./6mm-logo-assets.zip">
  Download 6mm-logo-assets.zip
</Download>

***

<Frame>
  <img src="data:image/png;base64," alt="" />
</Frame>

<h2 id="2-entry-banners">2. Entry Banners</h2>

Use Cases

* App homepage banners
* Web homepage hero banners
* Recommendation or campaign entry areas

Recommended Sizes (px)

| Size       | Usage Description              |
| ---------- | ------------------------------ |
| 750 × 300  | Mobile / H5 standard           |
| 1125 × 450 | High-resolution mobile         |
| 1200 × 480 | General-purpose banner         |
| 1440 × 480 | Web primary visual section     |
| 1920 × 600 | Desktop / large-screen display |

Aspect Ratio Guidance

* Horizontal layout
* Recommended ratios: 4:1, 5:2, 3:1

Usage Rules

* Keep primary content centered
* Reserve ≥ 10% safe margin on both sides
* Avoid variable-length copy within the asset

Formats

* PNG

Download

<Download src="./6mm-entry-banner-assets.zip">
  Download 6mm-entry-banner-assets.zip
</Download>

***

<Frame>
  <img src="data:image/png;base64," alt="" />
</Frame>

<h2 id="3-card-module-entries">3. Card / Module Entries</h2>

Use Cases

* App homepage feature cards
* Web modular functional entries
* Trading feature blocks within content feeds

Common Ratios & Recommended Sizes (px)

| Type            | Ratio | Recommended Size | Usage Description            |
| --------------- | ----- | ---------------- | ---------------------------- |
| Horizontal card | 16:9  | 640 × 360        | Feeds / recommendation areas |
| Horizontal card | 16:9  | 1280 × 720       | High-resolution web cards    |
| Horizontal card | 3:2   | 600 × 400        | Functional modules           |
| Vertical card   | 4:5   | 600 × 750        | List-based entries           |
| Square card     | 1:1   | 512 × 512        | Grid layouts                 |
| Square card     | 1:1   | 1024 × 1024      | High-resolution display      |

Design Rules

* Center the primary visual
* Text areas must allow cropping
* Maintain ≥ 8% safe margin on all sides
* Do not rely on rounded corners or shadow effects

Formats

* PNG

Download

<Download src="./6mm-card-entry-assets.zip">
  Download 6mm-card-entry-assets.zip
</Download>

***

<h2 id="4-general-usage-rules">4. General Usage Rules</h2>

* Prefer high-resolution or vector assets
* Avoid embedding fixed business logic or marketing copy within assets
* Assets should support dark mode environments
* Assets are limited to trading entry and interface assistance purposes

***

<h2 id="5-versioning-and-maintenance">5. Versioning & Maintenance</h2>

* Asset sizes and specifications may be updated alongside product upgrades
* Partners are advised to use the latest asset packages
* Older asset versions are not recommended for new integrations

For special requirements regarding asset specifications or downloads, please contact 6MM official technical or business support.
